Product Designer

Design · Remote

Acme Corp is redesigning our checkout experience redesign end to end, and we're looking for a Product Designer to lead that work from research through polished, shipped UI.

What You'll Do

Own the checkout experience redesign, from user research to high-fidelity prototypes. Partner closely with engineering and product on a full-time basis to ship iteratively. Present design work to leadership and incorporate feedback quickly.

What We're Looking For

4+ years of experience designing consumer-facing products. A strong portfolio showing end-to-end process. Comfortable working remote or hybrid, with occasional travel to our SF office.

Benefits

We offer a competitive salary and equity package. Benefits include health, dental, and vision coverage, plus a flexible PTO policy. Acme Corp is an equal opportunity employer.

Related Jobs

  • UX Researcher
  • Frontend Engineer
